description_long: This fence consists of a series of vertical cylindrical posts resembling bamboo, evenly spaced and connected by two horizontal rails, one near the top and one near the bottom. The vertical posts are rounded and have a natural wood texture, with visible nodes and slight variations in diameter, giving a rustic appearance. The horizontal rails are darker in color and appear to be made of metal or treated wood, securely holding the vertical posts in place with visible fastenings at each intersection. The top of the fence is flat, with each post ending in a smooth, rounded cap. There are no decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing a simple, utilitarian design. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and likely movable, suitable for temporary or semi-permanent use in parks, gardens, or urban green spaces.
description: A simple, rustic fence made of vertical bamboo-like posts connected by two dark horizontal rails, with a flat top and rounded post caps.
description_view_0: Front view showing all vertical posts, horizontal rails, and the flat, even top edge.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the alignment of the posts.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the same arrangement of posts and rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the depth of the posts.
